steps.title: Keep one main verb
steps.content: The sentence's main verb is was thereby empowered. The opening needs to identify Pennsylvania and provide background about its becoming a state without adding another finite verb that would compete with the main clause.

steps.title: Reject extra finite verbs
steps.content: Choice A, Choice B, and Choice C all add finite verbs before the comma, creating a comma splice with was thereby empowered. A participial phrase after Pennsylvania can supply the background while leaving the sentence with one main verb. The answer is D.
